MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel Joseph Sacramento for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to Defendant's Counsel Joseph Sacramento off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR# 11055. (212)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Defts' Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Documents,
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Anthony Di Genova's Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant's Form And Special Interrogatories and Request For Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs Pauline Gunderson, Edward Gunderson, Robert Gunderson, Cathleen Gunderson, Raymond Choy, Lorraine Choy, Nubuko Fong, and George Fong are ordered to respond to the Form Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff Raymond Choy is ordered to respond to Defendant's Form And Special Interrogatories and Request For Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiffs' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiffs, jointly and severally, in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
